properties.SQL Query:
MERGE INTO HOMEGROWN.NS.TBLCUSTOMERADDRESSES AS target
USING (
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY ID 
                ORDER BY UPDATEDUTC DESC NULLS LAST,
                         INSERTEDUTC DESC NULLS LAST
            ) AS rn
        FROM HOMEGROWN_RAW.NS.TBLCUSTOMERADDRESSES
    )
    WHERE rn = 1
) AS source
ON target.ID = source.ID
WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET
        target.CUSTOMERID = source.CUSTOMERID,
        target.LABEL = source.LABEL,
        target.ADDRESSEE = source.ADDRESSEE,
        target.ATTENTION = source.ATTENTION,
        target.ADDRESS1 = source.ADDRESS1,
        target.ADDRESS2 = source.ADDRESS2,
        target.ADDRESS3 = source.ADDRESS3,
        target.CITY = source.CITY,
        target.STATE = source.STATE,
        target.ZIP = source.ZIP,
        target.COUNTRY = source.COUNTRY,
        target.PHONE = source.PHONE,
        target.TEXT = source.TEXT,
        target.SALESREPID = source.SALESREPID,
        target.SALESREP = source.SALESREP,
        target.BILLCODEID = source.BILLCODEID,
        target.STORENUMBER = source.STORENUMBER,
        target.CRMGUID = source.CRMGUID,
        target.ISDEFAULTBILLING = source.ISDEFAULTBILLING,
        target.ISDEFAULTSHIPPING = source.ISDEFAULTSHIPPING,
        target.CRMCUSTOMERID = source.CRMCUSTOMERID,
        target.CRMVENDORID = source.CRMVENDORID,
        target.LASTMODIFIEDDATE = source.LASTMODIFIEDDATE,
        target.INSERTEDUTC = source.INSERTEDUTC,
        target.UPDATEDUTC = source.UPDATEDUTC
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
    INSERT (ID, CUSTOMERID, LABEL, ADDRESSEE, ATTENTION, ADDRESS1, ADDRESS2, ADDRESS3, CITY, STATE, ZIP, COUNTRY, PHONE, TEXT, SALESREPID, SALESREP, BILLCODEID, STORENUMBER, CRMGUID, ISDEFAULTBILLING, ISDEFAULTSHIPPING, CRMCUSTOMERID, CRMVENDORID, LASTMODIFIEDDATE, INSERTEDUTC, UPDATEDUTC)
    VALUES (source.ID, source.CUSTOMERID, source.LABEL, source.ADDRESSEE, source.ATTENTION, source.ADDRESS1, source.ADDRESS2, source.ADDRESS3, source.CITY, source.STATE, source.ZIP, source.COUNTRY, source.PHONE, source.TEXT, source.SALESREPID, source.SALESREP, source.BILLCODEID, source.STORENUMBER, source.CRMGUID, source.ISDEFAULTBILLING, source.ISDEFAULTSHIPPING, source.CRMCUSTOMERID, source.CRMVENDORID, source.LASTMODIFIEDDATE, source.INSERTEDUTC, source.UPDATEDUTC);

SELECT cab.internalid AS ID,
       cab.entity AS CustomerID,
       cab.defaultbilling AS IsDefaultBilling,
       cab.defaultshipping AS IsDefaultShipping,
       cab.label AS Label,
       ea.addr1 AS Address1,
       ea.addr2 AS Address2,
       ea.addr3 AS Address3,
       ea.addressee AS Addressee,
       ea.addrphone AS Phone,
       ea.addrtext AS Text,
       ea.attention AS Attention,
       ea.city AS City,
       ea.country AS Country,
       ea.custrecord_fmt_crm_account_data_customer AS CRMCustomerID,
       ea.custrecord_fmt_crm_account_vendor AS CRMVendorID,
       ea.state AS State,
       ea.zip AS Zip,
       custrecord_address_sales_rep AS SalesRepID,
 CONCAT(CONCAT(e.firstname, ' '),e.lastname) AS SalesRep,
       custrecord_fmt_address_bill_code_cus AS BillCodeID,
       custrecord_fmt_customer_store_number AS StoreNumber,
       custrecord_fmt_salesforce_guid AS CRMGUID,
       ea.lastModifiedDate AS LastModifiedDate
FROM customerAddressBook cab
    INNER JOIN EntityAddress ea
        ON cab.addressbookaddress = ea.recordowner
LEFT JOIN employee e
ON custrecord_address_sales_rep = e.id

MERGE INTO HOMEGROWN.NS.TBLTRANSACTIONS AS DEST
USING (
    -- Deduplicate source data - keep only latest record per ID
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT *,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                   PARTITION BY ID 
                   ORDER BY UPDATEDUTC DESC NULLS LAST, 
                            INSERTEDUTC DESC NULLS LAST
               ) AS row_num
        FROM HOMEGROWN_RAW.NS.TBLTRANSACTIONS
    )
    WHERE row_num = 1
) AS SRC 
ON DEST.ID = SRC.ID
WHEN MATCHED THEN
UPDATE SET

    TRANSACTIONDATE = SRC.TRANSACTIONDATE,

SELECT t.id AS ID,
	t.externalid AS ExternalID,
	t.trandate AS TransactionDate,
	t.tranid AS TransactionAlphaID,
	t.number AS Number,
	t.transactionnumber AS TransactionNumber,
	t.trandisplayname AS DisplayName,
	t.recordtype AS RecordType,
	t.entity AS EntityID,
	t.custbody_batch_number AS CustomBatchNumber,
	t.custbody_fmt_order_number AS CustomOrderNumber,
	t.custbody_fmt_source_invoice_number AS SourceInvoiceNumber,
	t.billingaddress AS BillingAddressID,
	t.shippingaddress AS ShippingAddressID,
	t.duedate,
	t.daysopen AS DaysOpen,
	t.foreigntotal AS ForeignTotal,
	t.foreignamountpaid AS ForeignAmountPaid,
	t.foreignamountunpaid AS ForeignAmountUnpaid,
	t.estgrossprofit AS EstGrossProfit,
	t.posting AS IsPosting,
	t.postingperiod AS PostingPeriodID,
	t.source AS Source,
	t.approvalstatus AS ApprovalStatusID,
	t.nextapprover AS NextApproverID,
	t.status,
	t.void AS IsVoid,
	t.createdby AS CreatedByID,
	t.createddate AS CreatedDate,
	t.lastmodifiedby AS LastModifiedByID,
	t.lastmodifieddate AS LastModifiedDate,
	t.custbody_iwp_linked_estimate AS IWPLinkedEstimateID,
	BUILTIN.DF(t.custbody_iwp_linked_estimate) AS IWPLinkedEstimate,
	t.custbody_iwp_blanket_po AS IWPBlanketPOID,
	BUILTIN.DF(t.custbody_iwp_blanket_po) AS IWPBlanketPO,
	t.endDate AS EndDate,
	t.startDate AS StartDate,
	t.custbody_iwp_dropship_so AS DropshipSOID,
	BUILTIN.DF(t.custbody_iwp_dropship_so) AS DropshipSO,
	t.custbody_fmt_sb_hauler_type AS HaulerType,
	t.custbody_iwp_cropyear AS CropYear,
	t.partner AS PartnerID,
	BUILTIN.DF(t.partner) AS Partner,
	t.custbody_iwp_broker_confirmation_num AS IWPBrokerConfNum,
	t.custbody_iwp_broker_rate AS IWPBrokerRate,
	t.custbody_iwp_broker_rate_per_ton AS IWPBrokerRatePerTonID,
	BUILTIN.DF(t.custbody_iwp_broker_rate_per_ton) AS IWPBrokerRatePerTon,
	t.custbody_sn_plant_shrink AS PlantShrink,
	t.custbody_sn_miu_shrink AS MIUShrink,
	t.foreignpaymentamountunused,
	t.foreignpaymentamountused,
	t.memo,
	t.custbody_sn_contract_release_lnk As CustBodySNContractRelease
FROM transaction t
WHERE t.id IN
      (
          SELECT DISTINCT
                 tl2.transaction
          FROM transaction t2
              LEFT JOIN transactionline tl2
                  ON t2.id = tl2.transaction
          WHERE (t2.lastmodifieddate >= {ts '${lookback.date}'}
       OR tl2.linelastmodifieddate >= {ts '${lookback.date}'})
      )

MERGE INTO HOMEGROWN.NS.TBLACCOUNTS AS DEST
USING (
    -- Deduplicate source data - keep only latest record per ID
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT *,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                   PARTITION BY ID
                   ORDER BY UPDATEDUTC DESC NULLS LAST,
                            INSERTEDUTC DESC NULLS LAST
               ) AS row_num
        FROM HOMEGROWN_RAW.NS.TBLACCOUNTS
    )
    WHERE row_num = 1
) AS SRC
ON DEST.ID = SRC.ID
WHEN MATCHED THEN
  UPDATE SET
    EXTERNALID      = SRC.EXTERNALID,
    ACCOUNTNUMBER   = SRC.ACCOUNTNUMBER,
    DESCRIPTION     = SRC.DESCRIPTION,
    FULLNAME        = SRC.FULLNAME,
    ACCOUNTTYPE     = SRC.ACCOUNTTYPE,
    SUBSIDIARYIDS   = SRC.SUBSIDIARYIDS,
    CLASSID         = SRC.CLASSID,
    DEPARTMENTID    = SRC.DEPARTMENTID,
    LOCATIONID      = SRC.LOCATIONID,
    BALANCE         = SRC.BALANCE,
    PARENTID        = SRC.PARENTID,
    ISINACTIVE      = SRC.ISINACTIVE,
    LASTMODIFIEDDATE= SRC.LASTMODIFIEDDATE,
    INSERTEDUTC     = SRC.INSERTEDUTC,
    UPDATEDUTC      = SRC.UPDATEDUTC
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
  INSERT (
    ID,
    EXTERNALID,
    ACCOUNTNUMBER,
    DESCRIPTION,
    FULLNAME,
    ACCOUNTTYPE,
    SUBSIDIARYIDS,
    CLASSID,
    DEPARTMENTID,
    LOCATIONID,
    BALANCE,
    PARENTID,
    ISINACTIVE,
    LASTMODIFIEDDATE,
    INSERTEDUTC,
    UPDATEDUTC
  )
  VALUES (
    SRC.ID,
    SRC.EXTERNALID,
    SRC.ACCOUNTNUMBER,
    SRC.DESCRIPTION,
    SRC.FULLNAME,
    SRC.ACCOUNTTYPE,
    SRC.SUBSIDIARYIDS,
    SRC.CLASSID,
    SRC.DEPARTMENTID,
    SRC.LOCATIONID,
    SRC.BALANCE,
    SRC.PARENTID,
    SRC.ISINACTIVE,
    SRC.LASTMODIFIEDDATE,
    SRC.INSERTEDUTC,
    SRC.UPDATEDUTC
  );

properties.SQL Query:
SELECT  
    i.id AS ID,
    SUBSTR(i.itemid, INSTR(i.itemid, '-', 1, 2) + 1, 100) AS ItemNumber,
    c.entityid AS CustomerNumber,
    d.name AS DestinationCode,
    i.externalid AS ExternalID,
    i.itemid AS ItemID,
    i.fullname AS FullName,
    i.displayname AS DisplayName,
    i.description AS Description,
    i.itemtype AS ItemType,
    i.subtype AS Subtype,
    i.subsidiary AS SubsidiaryID,
    i.class AS ClassID,
    i.department AS DepartmentID,
    i.location AS LocationID,
    i.parent AS ParentID,
    i.unitstype AS UnitTypeID,
    i.purchaseunit AS PurchaseUnitID,
    i.saleunit AS SaleUnitID,
    i.stockunit AS StockUnitID,
    i.expenseaccount AS ExpenseAccountID,
    i.incomeaccount AS IncomeAccountID,
    --i.custitem_ava_taxcode AS AvataxTaxCode,
    i.cseg_fmt_prod_line AS ProductLineID,
    BUILTIN.DF(i.cseg_fmt_prod_line) AS ProductLine,
    i.isfulfillable AS IsFulfillable,
    i.isinactive AS IsInactive,
    i.createddate AS CreatedDate,
    i.lastmodifieddate AS LastModifiedDate,
    i.custitem_iwp_commodity_code AS NonInventoryCommodityCodeID,
    BUILTIN.DF(i.custitem_iwp_commodity_code) AS NonInventoryCommodityCode,
    i.assetAccount AS AssetAccountID,
    i.custitem_oms_roundtrip_miles as RoundTripMiles,
    d.custrecord_oms_latitude as OMSLatitude,
    d.custrecord_oms_longitude as OMSLongitude,
    i.custitem_oms_active_item As OMSItem,
    i.custitem_oms_inactive_item as OMSInactive,
    BUILTIN.DF(i.purchaseunit) AS PrimaryPurchaseUnit,
    BUILTIN.DF(i.saleunit) AS PrimarySaleUnit,
    i.custitem_fmt_item_product_code As ProductCode,
    BUILTIN.DF(i.expenseaccount) AS ExpenseCogsAccount,
    (Select Top 1 Price From nonInventoryItemPrice Where item = i.ID) as BasePrice,
    BUILTIN.DF(custitem_taxproductclass_vt) AS TaxProdClass
FROM item as i
LEFT JOIN customer c ON i.custitem_assoccust = c.id
LEFT JOIN CUSTOMRECORD_OMS_DESTINATION d ON i.custitem_oms_item_destination = d.id

properties.SQL Query: CALL HOMEGROWN.NS.SP_REBUILD_NEXT_TRX_LINKS();
TRUNCATE TABLE HOMEGROWN_RAW.NS.TBLNEXTTRANSACTIONLINELINK;

SELECT ntll.linktype,
ntll.lastmodifieddate,
ntll.nextdoc,
ntll.nextline,
ntll.nexttype,
ntll.foreignamount,
ntll.previousdoc,
ntll.previousline,
ntll.previoustype
FROM NextTransactionLineLink ntll
WHERE ntll.previousdoc IN
      (
          SELECT DISTINCT
                 tl2.transaction
          FROM transaction t2
              INNER JOIN transactionline tl2
                  ON t2.id = tl2.transaction
          WHERE (t2.lastmodifieddate >= {ts '${lookback.date}'}
       OR tl2.linelastmodifieddate >= {ts '${lookback.date}'})
      );

SELECT id AS InternalID,

MERGE INTO HOMEGROWN.NS.TBLCONTRACTTYPES AS dest
USING (
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY INTERNALID 
                ORDER BY UPDATEDUTC DESC NULLS LAST,
                         INSERTEDUTC DESC NULLS LAST
            ) AS rn
        FROM HOMEGROWN_RAW.NS.TBLCONTRACTTYPES
    )
    WHERE rn = 1
) AS src
ON dest.INTERNALID = src.INTERNALID
WHEN MATCHED THEN
  UPDATE SET
    EXTERNALID = src.EXTERNALID,
    ABBREVIATION = src.ABBREVIATION,
    CREATED = src.CREATED,
    INACTIVE = src.INACTIVE,
    LASTMODIFIED = src.LASTMODIFIED,
    LASTMODIFIEDBYID = src.LASTMODIFIEDBYID,
    NAME = src.NAME,
    OWNERID = src.OWNERID,
    RECORDID = src.RECORDID,
    SCRIPTID = src.SCRIPTID,
    INSERTEDUTC = src.INSERTEDUTC,
    UPDATEDUTC = src.UPDATEDUTC
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
  INSERT (
    INTERNALID,
    EXTERNALID,
    ABBREVIATION,
    CREATED,
    INACTIVE,
    LASTMODIFIED,
    LASTMODIFIEDBYID,
    NAME,
    OWNERID,
    RECORDID,
    SCRIPTID,
    INSERTEDUTC,
    UPDATEDUTC
  )
  VALUES (
    src.INTERNALID,
    src.EXTERNALID,
    src.ABBREVIATION,
    src.CREATED,
    src.INACTIVE,
    src.LASTMODIFIED,
    src.LASTMODIFIEDBYID,
    src.NAME,
    src.OWNERID,
    src.RECORDID,
    src.SCRIPTID,
    src.INSERTEDUTC,
    src.UPDATEDUTC
  );

custcol_iwp_linked_po AS IWPLinkedPOID,
custcol_iwp_fuel_surcharge AS IWPFuelSurchargePct,
custcol_driver_rate_iwp AS IWPDriverRate,
       tl.createdfrom AS CreatedFromID,
       tl.linelastmodifieddate AS LastModifiedDate
FROM transactionline tl
WHERE tl.transaction IN
      (
          SELECT DISTINCT 
                 tl2.transaction
          FROM transaction t2
              INNER JOIN transactionline tl2
                  ON t2.id = tl2.transaction
          WHERE (t2.lastmodifieddate >= {ts '${lookback.date}'}
       OR tl2.linelastmodifieddate >= {ts '${lookback.date}'})
      );
CALL HOMEGROWN.NS.SP_INSERT_STAGED_TRX_LINES()

parameters.description: The database where data will be persisted. It must already exist in Snowflake
parameters.name: Destination Database

parameters.description: Leave this blank when using Session Token for your Authentication Strategy. When using KEY_PAIR, provide your Snowflake account name formatted as [organization-name]-[account-name] where data will be persisted.
parameters.name: Snowflake Account Identifier

parameters.description: When using SPCS, use SNOWFLAKE_SESSION_TOKEN as the value for Authentication Strategy. When using BYOC, use KEY_PAIR as the value for Authentication Strategy.
parameters.name: Snowflake Authentication Strategy

parameters.description: Leave this blank when using Session Token for your Authentication Strategy. When using KEY_PAIR, provide the RSA private key used for authentication. The RSA key must be formatted according to PKCS8 standards and have standard PEM headers and footers. Note that either Snowflake Private Key File or Snowflake Private Key must be defined.
parameters.name: Snowflake Private Key

parameters.description: Leave this blank when using Session Token for your Authentication Strategy. When using KEY_PAIR, upload the file that contains the RSA Private Key used for authentication to Snowflake, formatted according to PKCS8 standards and having standard PEM headers and footers. The header line begins with -----BEGIN PRIVATE. Select the Reference asset checkbox to upload the private key file.
parameters.name: Snowflake Private Key File

parameters.description: Leave this blank when using Session Token for your Authentication Strategy. When using KEY_PAIR, provide the password associated with the Snowflake Private Key File.
parameters.name: Snowflake Private Key Password

parameters.description: When using Session Token for your Authentication Strategy, use your Runtime Role. You can find your Runtime Role in the Openflow UI, by going to View Details for your Runtime. When using Key Pair for your Authentication Strategy, use a valid role configured for your service user.
parameters.name: Snowflake Role

parameters.description: Leave this blank when using Session Token for your Authentication Strategy. When using KEY_PAIR, provide the user name used to connect to Snowflake instance.
parameters.name: Snowflake Username

parameters.description: Snowflake warehouse used to run queries
parameters.name: Snowflake Warehouse
